title: Create: Molten Rocks
description: Just a simple mod that adds a recipe for lava using the Create mod
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1faa82b146663b3ccb9b0dac30683c6ed50108a.png)

Just a simple mod/datapack which adds a recipe for lava.

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35d36f1bbd6f7e145b086b9504d724559b8b8d3b.png)
